title: PreEmotionEvent
description: Anticipatory emotional signal event for SymbolOS. PreEmotion is the heart's prediction layer — feelings before the fact.

timestamp.description: When the PreEmotion signal was detected.

signal.description: The type of anticipatory emotional signal detected.

targetEvent.description: What event or action the PreEmotion signal is anticipating (e.g., 'deadline in 2h', 'PR merge', 'standup meeting').

confidence.description: Confidence level. 0-0.3 = background hum, 0.3-0.6 = soft signal, 0.6-0.8 = clear signal, 0.8-1.0 = strong signal.

suggestedResponse.description: Recommended agent behavioral adjustment based on the signal.

surfaceMode.description: How the signal should influence agent behavior. silent=log only, timing_adjust=delay/advance suggestions, soft_frame=change tone, active_support=explicitly offer help.

inputSignals.description: What signals contributed to this PreEmotion inference (e.g., 'calendar: deadline in 2h', 'tone: short answers', 'velocity: stalled').

enabled.description: Whether DND mode is active. If true, surfaceMode must be 'silent'.

scope.description: Visibility scope. PreEmotion defaults to private.

redaction.description: Redaction level for input signals. Default is strict.

provenance.description: Redacted features/signals and short reason strings for auditability.
